purpose: Image replacement manifest for Codex/developers. Keep filenames to avoid HTML changes, or update HTML/CSS references if filenames change.
global_note: All current image assets are labeled SVG placeholders. Replace with optimized JPG/WEBP/AVIF/SVG assets as appropriate. Maintain descriptive alt text.

placeholders.label: Hero Image — modern vehicle wrap, signage, or production shop action
